prompt: Kuukikan (空気感) style hyper-realistic film photograph. California suburban home living room, Saturday morning 9:00 AM. A Japanese-American family of four gathered together before a big cleanup day. Kenji (father, 38, short hair, lean, wearing a casual t-shirt) stands near the TV. Yuki (mother, 36, semi-long hair, designer aesthetic, comfortable weekend outfit) sits on the sofa. Ren (son, 10, energetic boy with a slight mischievous look) and Hana (daughter, 7, bright-eyed cheerful girl) sit on the floor. Cleaning supplies — a vacuum cleaner, garbage bags, cardboard boxes — are scattered nearby, ready to go. The TV in the background shows a blurred project map interface (out of focus). The atmosphere is 'let's do this' — a team about to embark on a mission together. Soft morning diffused light floods through large living room windows, illuminating the entire space evenly. Color grading: fresh Saturday morning tones — natural, slightly cool-warm balance. Film-like desaturation. Luminous open shadows. Composition: 16:9 wide frame. The living room space is shown broadly. The family is grouped together in the center but small relative to the room. Cleaning supplies add texture around them. Generous negative space on the sides. Camera: 35mm lens, f/3.5, ISO 200. Fine film grain. Warm domestic texture. Old-lens peripheral softness. The mood is family unity — a team moment before collaborative work. Excitement meets determination.
negative_prompt: dramatic lighting, lens flare, HDR, oversaturated, CGI, plastic skin, studio lighting, posed family portrait, stock photo feel, commercial, dark room, text overlays, watermarks, logos, AI smoothing, skin smoothing, digital painting, anime, cartoon, illustration, Western family
